title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, Luffy, King as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: RINGGGGG! RINGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGG

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What do you want ol ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hey, is that you, Swan?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What do you want?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OH!! Is that you, straw hat?! You're so strong!! You surprised me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oh! And don't call me "Mr. 2."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the Navy Intercepts this transmis- Sion, I'll be in big trouble!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But you just said it your- self!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Just tell us what you want.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oh right. I've taken your ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You gotta be joking!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cut the jokes, you silly clown!! Where are you now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: F WUP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ABOARD YOUR SHIP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Why You Dirty--!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Now don't be like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Ha ha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I thought ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...we were friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Chak....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does that mean he's protecting the merry from the navy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I knew he was a good guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He just wants someone on his side.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's stuck here without a way off the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, we gotta go. He's got our ship.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if it turns out to be a trap, we'll clobber him good.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: All right, then let's get ready...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You guys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I don't know what to do...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Vivl...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Listen care- fully, viv1.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll give you 12 hours to make up your mind.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once we recapture our ship in the Sandra River...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...We'll make a short stop at the East Port at Exactly 12 noon tomorrow!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't be able to drop anchor though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you want to join us on your journey ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... that will be your one and only chance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: If you're there ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...We'll welcome you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...as a fellow pirate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: VIVI, you're a princess. We can't offer you much.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Come on, Viv!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have to come! Come with us now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Stop it, Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Let's go.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys! Don't you want VIVI to come?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's not the point! She has to decide for herself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Tomorrow at noon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: to get to the East Port...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll take karoo four hours to run there, so I'd have to leave here by eight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never thought I'd actually consider becoming a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's such a big decision. But I'll never get another chance like this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: If I go...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You'll come too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ...won't you, kAROO?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What do you want to do...?

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 58 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
